headline: Constellation Energy (CEG) Completes $90M Limerick Clean Energy Center Outage Upgrade
summary: Constellation Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:CEG) is one of the best young stocks with the highest upside potential. On June 9, Constellation Energy announced the successful completion of a $90 million refueling and maintenance outage at its Limerick Clean Energy Center in Pottstown, Pennsylvania. The outage included upgrades designed to extend the long-term reliability of Unit 1 […]

headline: Constellation Energy (CEG) Unit Completes Megawatt Expansion of California Project
summary: Constellation Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:CEG) is one of the 10 Best Energy Stocks Capitalizing on the Data Center Boom. Of 22 analyst ratings compiled by CNN, 91% assigned a Buy rating to Constellation Energy, while 9% rated it Hold.
